seoTitle: Gilroyd vs Gingin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gilroyd and Gingin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gilroyd and Gingin.
heading: Gilroyd vs Gingin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gilroyd, Western Australia and Gingin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gilroyd has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Gingin (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gilroyd or Gingin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gilroyd has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Gingin scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gilroyd scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Gingin scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gilroyd or Gingin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gilroyd has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
